title: Black Road Drains
notes: Connects B4 Black Road Cut, C5 Transit Drain Market, future A5 Badlands Drain Route, and future B6 Lower Black Road.
Hidden drain-route layer with flooded channels, Black Road dead-drop station, crawl deck, Sable water cache, lower cell, and Deep Lantern rescue marks.
Flooded center is mostly blocked; raised platforms and outer service lanes remain walkable/driveable.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
